description: AP Tombola is an AP implementation of Tombola, an italian bingo game dating back to 1734

0.1.description:
# Version 0.1 - Initial Release

Features currently present:
- The game of Tombola, with 6 cards
- Cardsanity: The ability to lock cards, which must be unlocked by receiving a "Card Unlock" item
- Option to automatically hint all numbers
- Option to exclude items from other meta games (currently only APBingo) from being placed in AP Tombola's locations

In order to play the game, [download the client](https://github.com/Arenes214/AP-Tombola/releases) or go to the [web page on itch.io](https://arenes214.itch.io/ap-tombola)
For additional information, [read the documentation](https://github.com/Arenes214/APWorld-Tombola/blob/master/docs/en_AP%20Tombola.md)
0.1.title: v0.1 - Initial APWorld Release

0.1.1.description:

0.1.2.description:

0.1.2.title: v0.1.2 - The "I uploaded the wrong apworld" Update

0.2.description:
##  New Additions:
- **Milestones**
A new category of locations that exist alongside the Cards and require objectives that are "Card-agnostic" such as "Score 4 Terno" or "Obtain 7 even numbers".
18 Milestones will be chosen at random and added to your slot.
When completing a Milestone, you may click on it to send the respective location.
Completing an amount of Milestones (configurable in yaml) is now required to GOAL, alongside the usual Tombola requirement.

- **Rowsanity**
A new sanity option that creates, for each card and for each score other than Tombola, a location that will require *that specific row's numbers* to be checked

- **Useful Items**
- - *Free Mark!!!*: When used, a `Free Mark!!!` allows you to mark a number *that you have not received yet*, potentially getting a particular score out-of-logic!
- - *Free Location Hint*: When used, a hint will be created, free of charge, for a location in your world that contains a progression item!
(If all of the slot's unchecked locations do not have a progression item, no hint will be created and the player will be notified)
- - *Anti Trap Shield*: When received, the next Trap received will be blocked! Additionally, if a trap is in effect when receiving the `Anti Trap Shield`, the current trap will also be immediately stopped!

- **Traps**
- - *Blindness Trap*: When received, for the next 60 seconds, all numbers will be hidden. if markable, a number may still be marked by manually clicking on it.
- - *Lock Trap*: When received, for the next 30 seconds, numbers may not be marked.
(note: during a trap's effect, Automatic Marking does not work)

- **Save Slots and QoL**
- - Connection information for all of your slots may now be saved in-game!
- - All numbers marked are now saved! No need to mark them again when reconnecting!


## Changes:
- When starting the game, now *all* cards are locked but `Card x Unlock`s are given in starting inventory.
This change gives the game some locations that can be checked from the start of the game.
If Cardsanity is set, then the unlocks for the number of cards chosen in the yaml will not have their Unlocks in the starting inventory, but must be obtained normally.

- The client now shows information when connection is not successful

- The client now has a separate tab for Cards, Milestones and Goal Requirements

- AP Tombola Locations now only prevent *progression* items from AP Tombola Slots
(No functional changes since the older versions only had progression items)

## Bugfixes:
- Fixed an issue where the amount of tombola scored for the purposes of calculating goal may be incorrectly counted
- Fixed Game Logo having a rogue black pixel

## Download and How to Play:
- **APWorld**
- - The APWorld is available here: https://github.com/Arenes214/APWorld-Tombola/releases/tag/0.2

- **Client**
- - Client Download for Windows and Linux is available here: https://github.com/Arenes214/AP-Tombola/releases/tag/0.2
- - Client is also available as a website here: https://arenes214.itch.io/ap-tombola
- ** Client is backwards compatible with worlds generated on 0.1.x**
- ** Some features, like numbers marked being saved, will also work on 0.1.x worlds**
0.2.title: v0.2 - The Milestone Update

0.3.description:
##  New Additions
###  **Card Generation Criteria** Option
Determines how the Cards will be generated:
-  **Classic**: The normal Card generation criteria. the following Tombola rules will be followed:
-  - 1-9 in first column, 10-19 in second column, ..., 80-90 in last column
-  - All columns will have at least one number
-  - Numbers in the same column are ordered in ascending order
-  **Order**: Numbers will be distributed into card in order.
-  - 1 in Card 1, 2 in Card 2, ..., 6 in Card 6, 7 in Card 1, 8 in Card 2, ...
-  **Chaos**: Numbers will not respect the Tombola rules respected by the Classic option.
-  - e.g. 1 may appear in any column, 54 may appear before 22 in a column

### **Marksanity** Option
A new Sanity option that creates, for each Number, a location that will require you to Mark that Number to be checked
### **Additional Card Unlocks** Option
If Cardsanity and this option are enabled, an additional copy of "Card X Unlock" is created for each locked Card.

### **Location Groups**
Locations are now grouped, for easy usage in yaml options such as Priority Locations!
Location groups that now exist are:
- Card X Locations (for each Card)
- Regular Locations
- Rowsanity Locations
- Regular {score} Locations (for each type of score)
- Rowsanity {score} Locations (for each type of score)
- All {score} Locations (includes both Regular and Rowsanity locations, for each score)
- Milestone Locations
- Marksanity Locations
- Unlock Locations

### New Filler Items
The amount of filler has more than doubled!

## Changes
- Spoiler Log now display a player's Cards
- Hints in a Tombola location now displays what is needed to obtain it
example: `[Hint]: Player2's Pack Rat is at Card 1 - Ambo Reward 1 in Player1's World at Get 2 Numbers in any one of the following rows: [[3, 12, 50, 61, 81], [8, 31, 66, 71, 84], [25, 36, 45, 69, 87]].`
- Color of progression items is now lighter in the client's text chat
- Client now displays its version in the bottom left of the login screen
- When playing the game on **Android**, scroll bars are now 2.5x wider

## Bugfixes
- Fixed capitalization being wrong on some filler items
- Fixed APWorld being incompatible with APWorlds that modify other slot's Item Rules (such as SBURBelago)
- Fixed Unlock Locations not following `Prevent Other Meta Game Items` and being able to contain Progression items from AP Tombola
- Fixed Client erroneously making locked cards unlockable when connecting to a 0.2.x slot after logging out of a 0.1.x slot
- Fixed Client not showing `(found)` when hinting items already found
- Fixed extended hint info not showing when hinting items
- Fixed save info behaving incorrectly when deleting a save

## Download and How to Play:
- **APWorld**
- - The APWorld is available here: https://github.com/Arenes214/APWorld-Tombola/releases/tag/0.3

- **Client**
- - Client Download for Windows, Linux and Android is available here: https://github.com/Arenes214/AP-Tombola/releases/tag/0.3
- - Client is also available as a website here: https://arenes214.itch.io/ap-tombola
- ** Client is backwards compatible with worlds generated on 0.1.x and 0.2.x**
0.3.title: v0.3 - The Order & Chaos Update
